hazards.location: Staircase - only one handrail on right side
hazards.notes: NHS guidelines recommend handrails on both sides for safety

hazards.location: Step edges - no contrasting strips or marking
hazards.notes: Difficult to see step edges, especially for those with visual impairment
Dim lighting increases risk of missteps

hazards.location: Top of stairs - small rug at landing
hazards.notes: Loose rug at top of stairs is extremely dangerous
